text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. One key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analysing data without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning is a more advanced form of machine learning that uses large neural networks to process complex information, like images or speech. You already use AI in daily life—for example, when your phone suggests what to type next, when streaming services recommend movies, or when virtual assistants like Siri answer your questions.
